title: The Perfect Clue
writer: Lolita Ann Westman, Albert DeMond, Donald H. Brown
actors: David Manners, Richard 'Skeets' Gallagher, Dorothy Libaire
plot: Mona Stewart, madcap, spoiled daughter of a wealthy man, becomes upset when she learns that her father is engaged to a woman she hates. She runs away, via various modes of transportation, and hires an ex-con, David Mannering, to d...
